analyst.title: Maximize Every Moment
analyst.description: You thrive on plans, clarity, and smart choices. You know how to turn every step into a better experience, and your sense of structure helps life run at its best.

diplomat.title: Live Well, Enjoy More
diplomat.description: You are warm, social, and naturally tuned in to people. For you, the best moments in life are the ones shared, and your presence turns everyday scenes into joyful memories.

guardian.title: Classic Taste, Distinct Presence
guardian.description: You are dependable, thoughtful, and grounded in timeless taste. With your steady judgment and eye for lasting quality, you create a life that feels composed, refined, and trustworthy.

explorer.title: Chase Adventure, Find Every Surprise
explorer.description: You are energized by novelty, challenge, and discovery. Your curiosity pulls you toward the unexpected, and your adventurous spirit keeps life playful, vivid, and full of possibility.
